pr.title: RFC: A framework for deciding the n-gram question

output.summary: Eval-time n-gram cache mixes hash-collision-skewed counts with the base LM, highlighting how auxiliary state blows past the 16MB artifact limit.
techniques: Strict-causal n-gram cache mixing hashed counts with LM logits
Collision-driven min_count threshold analysis for hash tables
Proposed caps on auxiliary eval-time state and per-token overhead
